design_philosophy: Transmit absolute authority and unyielding safety. Use high contrast, massive typography, strict grid alignments, and a stark Black/White/Yellow palette to emulate the aesthetic of high-end industrial catalogs and construction blueprints.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-[6rem] uppercase tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]

rules: Headings must be Oswald, ALL CAPS, with negative letter spacing (tracking-tighter).
Body text must be IBM Plex Sans for a technical, precise, and readable feel.
Never use generic fonts like Inter or Space Grotesk.

layouts.grid_system: Strict 12-column bento/architectural grid. Heavy use of geometric rectangles.
layouts.spacing_scale: p-4, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32. Use generous padding inside sections.
layouts.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to maintain a hard, industrial, unyielding look.

sections.name: Header
sections.design: Fixed top. Initial state: bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-md text-white (to ensure contrast over hero). Scrolled state: bg-white text-[#111111] shadow-sm. Never completely transparent without blur.
sections.components: Logo, Navigation Links (Desktop), WhatsApp CTA Button.

sections.name: Hero Slider
sections.design: Full screen (h-screen). Kinetic typography. Images have a strict bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast. Use Framer Motion for line-by-line masked text reveals on load.
sections.components: H1 Title, Subtitle, Primary WhatsApp CTA, Slider Indicators (lines, not dots).

sections.name: Numbers / Counters
sections.design: Stark white or black background section. Massive typography for numbers (text-6xl+).
sections.motion: Intersection observer triggered counting up (framer-motion or react-countup).

sections.name: About (Quem Somos)
sections.design: Numbered manifesto chapters (01. MISSÃO, 02. VISÃO, 03. VALORES) in a horizontal scrolling carousel or strict grid. High typographic contrast.

sections.name: Services (GRO/PGR, etc.)
sections.design: Bento grid layout. Cards with 1px border (#3A3A3A on dark, #E5E7EB on light). Hover state: border turns #F4C400, slight negative Y translation.

sections.name: Trainings (NR Catalog)
sections.design: Dense vertical grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6). Looks like manual/book covers.
sections.components: Cards with massive 'NR' text, short title. Solid backgrounds alternating or gray scale with yellow hover.

sections.name: Photo Gallery Carousel
sections.design: Edge-to-edge swiper carousel. No gaps, pure cinematic photography. Drag to explore.

sections.name: Partners Marquee
sections.design: Slow, smooth, continuous editorial marquee. Grayscale partner logos.
sections.components: react-fast-marquee. Opacity 50% grayscale, hover to 100% color.

sections.name: Final CTA
sections.design: Aggressive, high conversion. Diagonal yellow/black hazard stripes as subtle background texture or border.
sections.components: Massive text 'PRONTO PARA REGULARIZAR SUA EMPRESA?', giant WhatsApp button.

sections.name: Footer
sections.design: bg-[#111111] text-white. 4 strict columns. Technical layout, crisp borders separating columns.
sections.components: Logo, Contact Info, Quick Links, Copyright.

visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid borders extensively to separate sections and create an architectural blueprint feel.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise/grain overlay on dark sections to simulate raw materials (concrete/steel vibe).
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Text links: underline expansion. Cards: border color shift to #F4C400. Images: subtle scale-in (1.05x) with overflow-hidden.

motion.scrolling: MUST use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. It gives the site physical 'weight'.
motion.reveals: Framer motion for text: staggerChildren, clip-path reveals. Elements slide up and fade in with a 'heavy' spring (stiffness: 50, damping: 20).

hero_1.description: Construction worker in high-vis vest and helmet.

pt_br_content.hero_h1: SEGURANÇA NÃO É OPÇÃO, É O ALICERCE.
pt_br_content.hero_sub: Consultoria técnica, treinamentos e gestão em Segurança do Trabalho para indústrias que não param.

about_manifesto.missao: Garantir a integridade física dos trabalhadores e a conformidade legal das empresas.
about_manifesto.visao: Ser a principal referência em engenharia de segurança no cenário industrial nacional.
about_manifesto.valores: Ética, Rigor Técnico, Compromisso com a Vida e Excelência.

services.title: GRO / PGR
services.desc: Gerenciamento de Riscos Ocupacionais focado na prevenção e conformidade.

services.title: PCMSO
services.desc: Programa de Controle Médico de Saúde Ocupacional alinhado ao PGR.

services.title: LTCAT / PPP
services.desc: Laudos técnicos precisos para aposentadoria especial e eSocial.

pt_br_content.final_cta_sub: Evite multas e proteja sua equipe. Nossa equipe de engenheiros está pronta para auditar sua operação.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Lenis for smooth scrolling (`@studio-freight/lenis`).
Install `framer-motion` for kinetic text reveals and scroll animations.
Install `react-fast-marquee` for the grayscale partners slider.
Use Phosphor Icons (`@phosphor-icons/react`) with 'bold' or 'fill' weight for an industrial look.
Set the Tailwind config to include the brand colors exactly as specified.
Ensure the hero slider uses a strict `bg-black/40` overlay over images so the massive white Oswald text is 100% legible.
Implement the WhatsApp CTA to open a new tab with `https://wa.me/5599999999999?text=Olá, gostaria de saber mais sobre os serviços de segurança do trabalho.`
Do not use generic Shadcn Cards if they look too 'SaaS'. Rebuild them to look like sharp-edged (rounded-none), border-heavy industrial blueprints.
Every button should be completely square (`rounded-none`), heavy, and aggressive. No cute pill buttons.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic: no generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, or uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and crisp, sharp edges.
MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Use specific transitions.
MUST NOT center align the app container in global CSS.
NEVER use AI assistant emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc. for icons.
Ensure all sections are completely responsive. Mobile first, but desktop must feel expansive.
